summary: The ad showcases a sample question from the Duolingo English Test, where a user writes a description of an image featuring Duo the owl at an airport. It concludes by highlighting that the test is accepted by more than 6,000 institutions worldwide, positioning it as a convenient option for students planning to study abroad.
